image:image.image:title: Artificial Intelligence in State Government Index
image:image.image:caption: A public-information benchmark measuring state and territory government responses to generative AI.

image:image.image:title: Congressional Office Setup and 100 Day Report
image:image.image:caption: A report on systems, staffing, and benchmarks used to stand up a brand-new congressional office.

image:image.image:title: AI, Digital Platforms, and Journalism Research
image:image.image:caption: A qualitative honors thesis on local journalism, democracy, labor, and media policy.

image:image.image:title: Electric Vehicle Charging Access Analysis
image:image.image:caption: A GIS and quantitative analysis project examining EV infrastructure access and charger gaps.

image:image.image:title: Communications Consultancy and Supporting Local Candidates
image:image.image:caption: Campaign websites, digital strategy, and rapid-response communications for local candidates.

image:image.image:title: Fulbright Focus Group Sponsored by OpenAI
image:image.image:caption: A six-session educator lab focused on practical and responsible uses of ChatGPT in education.

image:image.image:title: Political Reporting at WashU
image:image.image:caption: Student political reporting on protest, campus governance, elections, and institutional accountability.

image:image.image:title: Boehringer Cares Foundation Rebrand and Strategy Shift
image:image.image:caption: A rebrand and strategic redirect spanning narrative, UX, visual identity, and internal communications.

image:image.image:title: The 2022 Institute for Nonprofit News Index Survey
image:image.image:caption: A nonprofit news research project involving data collection, survey synthesis, and stakeholder outreach.

image:image.image:title: Exclusive Interview with High-Visibility Congressperson
image:image.image:caption: Political reporting on then-Congressman Peter Meijer during a volatile post-impeachment period.

image:image.image:title: Sustainable Development and Health Access Report
image:image.image:caption: Strategy and communications work around health access policy and sustainable development.
